title: Walking Home 放学路上
scene: 放学后两个好朋友一起走回家。

lines.en: Finally! School is over! I'm so tired today.
lines.zh: 终于！放学了！我今天好累。

lines.en: Me too. We had three tests today. That was a lot!
lines.zh: 我也是。我们今天考了三场试。太多了！

lines.en: How do you think you did on the math test?
lines.zh: 你觉得你数学考得怎么样？

lines.en: I think I did OK. The last question was hard, though.
lines.zh: 我觉得还行。不过最后一道题很难。

lines.en: I agree! I spent ten minutes on that one question.
lines.zh: 我同意！我在那一道题上花了十分钟。

lines.en: Let's not think about tests anymore. It's time to relax!
lines.zh: 我们别想考试了。该放松了！

lines.en: Good idea! Do you want to get some ice cream on the way?
lines.zh: 好主意！路上你想买点冰淇淋吗？

lines.en: Yes! There's a new ice cream shop around the corner.
lines.zh: 想！拐角有一家新的冰淇淋店。

lines.en: Awesome! Let's go! My treat today.
lines.zh: 太好了！我们走吧！今天我请客。

lines.en: Really? Thank you, Oliver! You're the best!
lines.zh: 真的吗？谢谢你，奥利弗！你最好了！
